title: Implement manager login-first bootstrap and session restore flow
description: Wire manager app startup to login-first auth state resolver using auth/me verification, remove dependency on static env-token bootstrap for normal path, and preserve deterministic auth fallback screens.
acceptance_criteria: Manager app starts at login when no valid session exists
Persisted token path validates with backend auth/me before entering dashboard
Unauthorized/session-expired transitions remain deterministic and user-recoverable
